item.title: K P R Mill Ltd Hits Intraday High with 6.11% Surge on 12 Mar 2026
item.description: K P R Mill Ltd recorded a robust intraday performance on 12 Mar 2026, surging to an intraday high of Rs 846.45, marking a 6.11% increase from its previous close. This rise comes after three consecutive days of decline, signalling a notable reversal in the stock’s short-term trend within the Garments & Apparels sector. Time: 1 minute ago

item.title: Bharat Heavy Electricals Ltd. Hits Intraday High with 5.2% Surge on 12 Mar 2026
item.description: Bharat Heavy Electricals Ltd. (BHEL) demonstrated robust intraday strength on 12 Mar 2026, surging to an intraday high of Rs 269.85, marking a 5.49% increase from its previous close. This performance notably outpaced the Electric Equipment sector and broader market indices, underscoring a day of significant trading momentum for the mid-cap heavy electrical equipment company. Time: 1 minute ago

item.title: Torrent Power Ltd. Surges to Intraday High with 5.26% Gain on 12 Mar 2026
item.description: Torrent Power Ltd. demonstrated robust intraday strength on 12 Mar 2026, surging 5.26% to touch a day’s high of Rs 1,506.7. This performance notably outpaced the Power sector’s gain of 3.62% and the broader Sensex, which declined by 0.65% amid a challenging market environment. Time: 1 minute ago

item.title: Ceinsys Tech Ltd Hits Intraday High with 7.31% Surge on 12 Mar 2026
item.description: Ceinsys Tech Ltd recorded a robust intraday performance on 12 Mar 2026, surging 7.31% to touch a day’s high of Rs 1,033.9. This strong upward movement outpaced its sector and broader market indices, reflecting notable trading momentum amid a volatile session. Time: 16 minutes ago

item.title: Regaal Resources Ltd Surges 17% to Hit Upper Circuit Amid Robust Buying Pressure
item.description: Regaal Resources Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Other Agricultural Products sector, witnessed a remarkable surge on 12 Mar 2026, hitting its upper circuit limit with a 17.02% gain. The stock’s strong buying pressure, coupled with heightened investor participation and significant trading volumes, propelled it to an intraday high of ₹87.69, marking a near 20% jump from its previous close. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Quicktouch Technologies Ltd Plunges to Lower Circuit Amid Heavy Selling Pressure
item.description: Quicktouch Technologies Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Computers - Software & Consulting sector, witnessed a sharp decline on 12 Mar 2026, hitting its lower circuit limit with a maximum daily loss of 4.47%. The stock closed at ₹31.00, down ₹1.45 from the previous close, reflecting intense selling pressure and panic among investors. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Akme Fintrade (India) Ltd Hits Upper Circuit Amid Strong Buying Pressure
item.description: Akme Fintrade (India) Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Non Banking Financial Company (NBFC) sector, surged to hit its upper circuit limit on 12 Mar 2026, reflecting robust investor demand and significant buying momentum. The stock closed at ₹8.15, marking a maximum daily gain of 2.64%, outperforming its sector and the broader Sensex indices despite a generally subdued market environment. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Goldstar Power Ltd Plunges to Lower Circuit Amid Heavy Selling Pressure
item.description: Shares of Goldstar Power Ltd, a micro-cap player in the FMCG sector, plunged to their lower circuit limit on 12 Mar 2026, closing at ₹7.8 with a maximum daily loss of 4.88%. The sharp decline was driven by intense selling pressure and panic among investors, resulting in unfilled supply and a significant drop in trading volumes. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: United Foodbrands Ltd Hits Lower Circuit Amid Heavy Selling Pressure
item.description: United Foodbrands Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Leisure Services sector, witnessed a sharp decline on 12 Mar 2026, hitting its lower circuit limit as intense selling pressure gripped the stock. The share price plunged by 6.28% intraday, closing near its lowest level of Rs 201.28, reflecting a day marked by panic selling and unfilled supply that overwhelmed demand. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Enviro Infra Engineers Ltd Sees Exceptional Volume Surge Amidst Positive Momentum
item.description: Enviro Infra Engineers Ltd (EIEL), a small-cap player in the Other Utilities sector, has witnessed a remarkable surge in trading volume and price momentum, outperforming its sector and broader market indices. The stock’s recent activity signals heightened investor interest and potential accumulation, despite its current sell-grade status. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Teamo Productions HQ Ltd Hits Upper Circuit Amid Strong Buying Pressure
item.description: Teamo Productions HQ Ltd, a micro-cap player in the construction sector, surged to hit its upper circuit price limit on 12 Mar 2026, reflecting robust buying interest despite broader market weakness. The stock outperformed its sector and the Sensex, signalling a notable shift in investor sentiment amid subdued liquidity and falling delivery volumes. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Doms Industries Ltd Surges on High Value Trading Amid Institutional Interest
item.description: Doms Industries Ltd (DOMS) emerged as one of the most actively traded stocks by value on 12 Mar 2026, registering a remarkable 10.48% gain intraday and outperforming its sector by 11.63%. The small-cap company witnessed robust trading volumes and significant institutional participation, signalling renewed investor confidence despite a recent downgrade in its Mojo Grade to Sell. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: BSE Ltd Sees Robust Value Trading Amid Mixed Market Sentiment
item.description: BSE Ltd, a prominent player in the capital markets sector, continues to command significant attention with one of the highest value turnovers in recent trading sessions. Despite a marginal dip of 0.33% on 12 March 2026, the stock outperformed its sector and broader market indices, reflecting sustained institutional interest and robust trading volumes that underscore its mid-cap stature and strong market positioning. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Sanco Industries Ltd Surges to Upper Circuit on Robust Buying Pressure
item.description: Sanco Industries Ltd, a micro-cap player in the diversified consumer products sector, surged to hit its upper circuit limit on 12 Mar 2026, registering a maximum daily gain of 4.66%. This sharp price movement was driven by robust buying interest, resulting in a regulatory freeze on further transactions and signalling unfilled demand at the peak price of ₹2.47. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Omkar Speciality Chemicals Ltd Hits Lower Circuit Amid Heavy Selling Pressure
item.description: Shares of Omkar Speciality Chemicals Ltd plunged to their lower circuit limit on 12 Mar 2026, closing at a new 52-week low of ₹3.80. The stock suffered a maximum daily loss of 4.76%, significantly underperforming its sector and broader market benchmarks amid intense selling pressure and dwindling investor participation. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Dharan Infra-EPC Ltd Sees Exceptional Volume Surge Amid Mixed Market Signals
item.description: Dharan Infra-EPC Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Realty sector, has emerged as one of the most actively traded stocks by volume on 12 March 2026, registering a remarkable surge in trading activity despite a stagnant price movement. The stock’s volume spike, coupled with its strong sell mojo grade, presents a complex picture for investors analysing accumulation and distribution trends in a challenging market environment. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Compuage Infocom Ltd Hits Lower Circuit Amid Heavy Selling Pressure
item.description: Compuage Infocom Ltd, a micro-cap player in the IT - Hardware sector, witnessed intense selling pressure on 12 Mar 2026, hitting its lower circuit price limit at ₹1.19. The stock’s maximum daily loss of 3.2% and unfilled supply have triggered panic selling, marking a new 52-week and all-time low, while underperforming both its sector and the broader market indices. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: HFCL Ltd Sees Exceptional Volume Surge Amidst Strong Price Gains
item.description: HFCL Ltd, a prominent player in the Telecom Equipment & Accessories sector, witnessed a remarkable surge in trading volume on 12 Mar 2026, reflecting heightened investor interest and positive price momentum. The stock outperformed its sector and broader market indices, signalling a potential shift in market sentiment for this small-cap telecom equipment company. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Tata Power Sees Robust Trading Activity Amid Sector Gains
item.description: Tata Power Company Ltd has emerged as one of the most actively traded stocks by value on 12 March 2026, reflecting strong investor interest and notable institutional participation. The stock has outperformed its sector peers and demonstrated a sustained upward momentum, supported by robust volume and value turnover in a buoyant power sector environment. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Coal India Ltd. Surges on High-Value Trading and Institutional Interest
item.description: Coal India Ltd. (COALINDIA) has emerged as one of the most actively traded stocks by value on 12 March 2026, registering a robust 4.43% gain and hitting a new 52-week high of Rs. 467.9. The large-cap mining giant’s shares have attracted significant institutional interest and large order flows, reflecting renewed investor confidence amid a positive sectoral backdrop and strong technical momentum. Time: 17 minutes ago
